codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly replaces the mocked version inspector with a fully real-API connected one. Supports version list, creation with auto-generated keys, publishing, and setting default version with optimistic updates. The editor upload component properly integrates a modal to validate and upload PNG/JPG files to the storage API and inserts the returned GCP URLs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker was unable to use the agent-browser tool due to an EACCES error on localhost port bind. They worked around this by writing temporary Playwright scripts for manual verification, suggesting the skill needs a documented fallback path for manual UI verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.deviations notes 'Attempted agent-browser first but daemon failed to bind (EACCES on localhost port)' and transcript shows the use of manual Playwright script execution.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Local API storage upload route fails with ENOENT due to a missing gcp-service-account.json credentials file, making end-to-end testing of the storage upload feature impossible locally without mocking.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.discoveredIssues notes 'real /api/storage/upload returned 400 because API runtime points to missing apps/api/gcp-service-account.json (ENOENT)'.

summary: Feature successfully integrates workspace admin versions UI and TipTap image uploads to real API endpoints, with appropriate optimistic UI updates and robust validation.
